runtime_tests.name: BoringSSL Go runner focused DTLS tests
runtime_tests.result: blocked: go command not available in PATH

results.change_condition: As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, for KeyUpdate
results.change_action: must be present / must be sent as acknowledgement
results.comment: KeyUpdate 接收路径在 key_update_requested 时调用 tls13_add_key_update 生成响应 KeyUpdate；DTLS 发送方密钥更新延后到该 KeyUpdate 被 ACK 后执行，符合 KeyUpdate 必须被确认的要求。
results.standard_basis: As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, KeyUpdates MUST be acknowledged.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be present / must be sent as acknowledgement；标准依据：As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, KeyUpdates MUST be acknowledged.；代码行为：KeyUpdate 接收路径在 key_update_requested 时调用 tls13_add_key_update 生成响应 KeyUpdate；DTLS 发送方密钥更新延后到该 KeyUpdate 被 ACK 后执行，符合 KeyUpdate 必须被确认的要求。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: IANA allocation for the ACK message
results.change_action: set to constant
results.comment: ACK content type 常量定义为 26，并且 DTLS 记录读取路径能识别 SSL3_RT_ACK。
results.standard_basis: IANA has allocated the content type value 26 in the "TLS ContentType" registry for the ACK message
results.comparison_summary: 需求：set to constant；标准依据：IANA has allocated the content type value 26 in the "TLS ContentType" registry for the ACK message；代码行为：ACK content type 常量定义为 26，并且 DTLS 记录读取路径能识别 SSL3_RT_ACK。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: If the implementation has received one or more ACKs from the peer in the SENDING state
results.change_action: must be used to judge acknowledged messages or message fragments; acknowledged ones SHOULD be omitted from transmission
results.comment: ACK 处理会把 ACKed record 映射到 sent_records 的消息范围，后续 seal_next_record 只取未标记范围，因此重传会省略已确认片段。
results.standard_basis: If the implementation has received one or more ACKs (see Section 7) from the peer, then it SHOULD omit any messages or message fragments which have already been acknowledged.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be used to judge acknowledged messages or message fragments; acknowledged ones SHOULD be omitted from transmission；标准依据：If the implementation has received one or more ACKs (see Section 7) from the peer, then it SHOULD omit any messages or message fragments which have already been acknowledged.；代码行为：ACK 处理会把 ACKed record 映射到 sent_records 的消息范围，后续 seal_next_record 只取未标记范围，因此重传会省略已确认片段。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: In the illustrated handshake after the client sends Certificate, CertificateVerify, and Finished
results.change_action: set to acknowledge record 2
results.related_state_or_step: example handshake with timeout and retransmission; Record 5 from server
results.comment: 该条来自 RFC 图示中的 Record 5 ACK [2]，是说明性示例，不是独立运行时 MUST/SHOULD。
results.standard_basis:
<--------               Record 5
                                                       ACK [2]
results.comparison_summary:
需求：set to acknowledge record 2；标准依据：<--------               Record 5
                                                       ACK [2]；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条来自 RFC 图示中的 Record 5 ACK [2]，是说明性示例，不是独立运行时 MUST/SHOULD。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: In the illustrated handshake, the client can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys
results.change_action: set to empty
results.related_state_or_step: example handshake with timeout and retransmission; Record 1 from client
results.comment: 该条来自 RFC 图示中的 empty ACK 示例，说明特定丢包时序，不是独立通用要求。
results.standard_basis:
the client sends an empty ACK message because it can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys... Record 1                  -------->
    ACK []
results.comparison_summary:
需求：set to empty；标准依据：the client sends an empty ACK message because it can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys... Record 1                  -------->
    ACK []；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条来自 RFC 图示中的 empty ACK 示例，说明特定丢包时序，不是独立通用要求。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight
results.change_action: validated value check: ACK must indicate a complete flight; cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED
results.comment: 完整 ACK 后 all_of(IsFullyAcked) 分支停止 timer、清理 outgoing_messages，并处理 KeyUpdate/queued KeyUpdate。
results.standard_basis: Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight, the implementation cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：validated value check: ACK must indicate a complete flight; cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED；标准依据：Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight, the implementation cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED.；代码行为：完整 ACK 后 all_of(IsFullyAcked) 分支停止 timer、清理 outgoing_messages，并处理 KeyUpdate/queued KeyUpdate。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: Upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight
results.change_action: validated value check: ACK must indicate a partial flight; retransmit the unacknowledged portion of the flight
results.comment: BoringSSL 接收 partial ACK 后会标记已确认的消息范围，并且后续重传只发送未确认范围；但 partial ACK 分支仅留下 TODO，没有立即调度重传或立刻进入发送未确认部分的路径，只能等现有 retransmit timer。
results.standard_basis: upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight (as mentioned in Section 7.1), the implementation transitions to the SENDING state, where it retransmits the unacknowledged portion of the flight
results.comparison_summary: 需求：validated value check: ACK must indicate a partial flight; retransmit the unacknowledged portion of the flight；标准依据：upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight (as mentioned in Section 7.1), the implementation transitions to the SENDING state, where it retransmits the unacknowledged portion of the flight；代码行为：标准要求收到 partial flight ACK 时转入 SENDING 并重传未确认部分。代码证明已确认范围会被跳过，但 partial 分支没有设置 sending_flight 或重传定时器，只在 TODO 中说明应调度重传，因此满足“重传内容选择”，缺少“收到 partial ACK 后主动调度/转入发送”的部分。；结论：部分满足。

results.change_condition: When an implementation receives an ACK
results.change_action: must be treated as acknowledging records that appear in it
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: Implementations MUST treat a record as having been acknowledged if it appears in any ACK;
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be treated as acknowledging records that appear in it；标准依据：Implementations MUST treat a record as having been acknowledged if it appears in any ACK;；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: When in the FINISHED state, for at least twice the default MSL, if the server receives retransmission of the client's final flight
results.change_action: set to retransmit of its ACK
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 final flight 和 post-handshake flight 保留 outgoing messages 并由 timer/ACK 驱动；runner 覆盖 ACKFinishedAfterAppData 等场景。
results.standard_basis: when in the FINISHED state, the server MUST respond to retransmission of the client's final flight with a retransmit of its ACK.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：set to retransmit of its ACK；标准依据：when in the FINISHED state, the server MUST respond to retransmission of the client's final flight with a retransmit of its ACK.；代码行为：DTLS 1.3 final flight 和 post-handshake flight 保留 outgoing messages 并由 timer/ACK 驱动；runner 覆盖 ACKFinishedAfterAppData 等场景。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: all other flights
results.change_action: must be sent
results.comment: 接收已处理 handshake record 后 records_to_ack 入队并启动 ACK timer；如果响应 flight 不能立即生成，dtls1_schedule_ack 会发送 ACK。
results.standard_basis: All other flights MUST be ACKed.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be sent；标准依据：All other flights MUST be ACKed.；代码行为：接收已处理 handshake record 后 records_to_ack 入队并启动 ACK timer；如果响应 flight 不能立即生成，dtls1_schedule_ack 会发送 ACK。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: during the handshake
results.change_action: must only cover the current outstanding flight
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: During the handshake, ACKs only cover the current outstanding flight
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must only cover the current outstanding flight；标准依据：During the handshake, ACKs only cover the current outstanding flight；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: flights are not implicitly acknowledged
results.change_action: must be ACKed
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: In general, flights MUST be ACKed unless they are implicitly acknowledged.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be ACKed；标准依据：In general, flights MUST be ACKed unless they are implicitly acknowledged.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: for flights implicitly acknowledged by receipt of the next flight
results.change_action: should not be sent unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: ACKs SHOULD NOT be sent for these flights unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：should not be sent unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately；标准依据：ACKs SHOULD NOT be sent for these flights unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: for post-handshake messages and for each received and processed handshake record
results.change_action: should be sent once
results.new_value: one ACK per received and processed handshake record
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: For post-handshake messages, ACKs SHOULD be sent once for each received and processed handshake record
results.comparison_summary: 需求：should be sent once；标准依据：For post-handshake messages, ACKs SHOULD be sent once for each received and processed handshake record；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: handshake messages are discarded because they are not the next expected message
results.change_action: must not be sent
results.comment: 解析失败、解密失败和过远未来 fragment 不进入 records_to_ack，因此不会 ACK 未处理/未缓存的消息。
results.standard_basis: implementations MUST NOT send ACKs for handshake messages which they discard because they are not the next expected message.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must not be sent；标准依据：implementations MUST NOT send ACKs for handshake messages which they discard because they are not the next expected message.；代码行为：解析失败、解密失败和过远未来 fragment 不进入 records_to_ack，因此不会 ACK 未处理/未缓存的消息。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: if space is limited
results.change_action: should favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged
results.comment: send_ack 按 MTU 计算可容纳 ACK 数量并从 MRUQueue 末尾选取最近待 ACK 记录；这实现了空间受限时优先 ACK 当前保留记录。
results.standard_basis: if space is limited, implementations SHOULD favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：should favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged；标准依据：if space is limited, implementations SHOULD favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged.；代码行为：send_ack 按 MTU 计算可容纳 ACK 数量并从 MRUQueue 末尾选取最近待 ACK 记录；这实现了空间受限时优先 ACK 当前保留记录。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: if the first byte is ack(proposed, 26)
results.change_action: must equal
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: *  If the first byte is alert(21), handshake(22), or ack(proposed,      26), the record MUST be interpreted as a DTLSPlaintext record.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal；标准依据：*  If the first byte is alert(21), handshake(22), or ack(proposed,      26), the record MUST be interpreted as a DTLSPlaintext record.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: in general when constructing an ACK record and space permits
results.change_action: should ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record
results.new_value: as many received packets as can fit
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: implementations SHOULD ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record
results.comparison_summary: 需求：should ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record；标准依据：implementations SHOULD ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: post-handshake
results.change_action: may cover more than one flight
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: and MAY cover more than one flight.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：may cover more than one flight；标准依据：and MAY cover more than one flight.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: record cannot be deprotected
results.change_action: must not be sent for that record
results.comment: 只有成功解析、找到 epoch、通过 AEAD Open 并成功处理 handshake fragment 的记录才加入 records_to_ack；不能解密的记录在记录层丢弃。
results.standard_basis: ACKs MUST NOT be sent for records of any content type other than handshake or for records which cannot be deprotected.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must not be sent for that record；标准依据：ACKs MUST NOT be sent for records of any content type other than handshake or for records which cannot be deprotected.；代码行为：只有成功解析、找到 epoch、通过 AEAD Open 并成功处理 handshake fragment 的记录才加入 records_to_ack；不能解密的记录在记录层丢弃。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: records contain messages discarded because a previous copy has been received
results.change_action: may still be covered
results.comment: 已经收到的重复/过去 fragment 会被忽略为消息内容，但记录仍可加入 ACK 队列，符合可覆盖重复消息记录的规则。
results.standard_basis: This includes records containing messages which are discarded because a previous copy has been received.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：may still be covered；标准依据：This includes records containing messages which are discarded because a previous copy has been received.；代码行为：已经收到的重复/过去 fragment 会被忽略为消息内容，但记录仍可加入 ACK 队列，符合可覆盖重复消息记录的规则。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: records containing handshake messages or fragments have not been processed or buffered
results.change_action: must not be present
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: Implementations MUST NOT acknowledge records containing handshake messages or fragments which have not been processed or buffered.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must not be present；标准依据：Implementations MUST NOT acknowledge records containing handshake messages or fragments which have not been processed or buffered.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: server ACK would otherwise cover both ClientHello and the client's Certificate message
results.change_action: must not cover both because they are in different flights
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 ACK parsing, ACK record construction, ACK-driven sent-record range marking, implicit ACK handling, delayed ACK scheduling, and final-flight/post-handshake retransmission tracking.
results.standard_basis: an ACK from the server would not cover both the ClientHello and the client's Certificate message, because the ClientHello and client Certificate are in different flights.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must not cover both because they are in different flights；标准依据：an ACK from the server would not cover both the ClientHello and the client's Certificate message, because the ClientHello and client Certificate are in different flights.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 中除隐式确认外的握手/后握手 flight 通过 ACK 明确确认，ACK 只确认已处理或已缓存的握手记录，并驱动停止或重传。代码在记录解密和握手片段处理之后才加入 records_to_ack，发送 ACK 时按 MTU 取可容纳记录并排序，接收 ACK 时匹配 sent_records 并标记对应消息范围；完整确认会停止重传并清理 flight。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: upon receiving a message from a handshake flight
results.change_action: previous flight(s) are implicitly acknowledged
results.new_value: all messages from the previous flight(s) acknowledged
results.comment: 握手期间收到下一 flight 的任何部分时设置 implicit_ack，并停止上一 flight timer、清理 outgoing messages。
results.standard_basis: receiving a message from a handshake flight implicitly acknowledges all messages from the previous flight(s).
results.comparison_summary: 需求：previous flight(s) are implicitly acknowledged；标准依据：receiving a message from a handshake flight implicitly acknowledges all messages from the previous flight(s).；代码行为：握手期间收到下一 flight 的任何部分时设置 implicit_ack，并停止上一 flight timer、清理 outgoing messages。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: upon receiving the start of the next flight
results.change_action: clear covered ACK list
results.comment: 构造响应 flight 时 dtls1_finish_flight 清空 records_to_ack，等价于在下一 flight 开始时清理 ACK 列表。
results.standard_basis: Implementations can accomplish this by clearing their ACK list upon receiving the start of the next flight.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：clear covered ACK list；标准依据：Implementations can accomplish this by clearing their ACK list upon receiving the start of the next flight.；代码行为：构造响应 flight 时 dtls1_finish_flight 清空 records_to_ack，等价于在下一 flight 开始时清理 ACK 列表。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: when an implementation detects a disruption in the receipt of the current incoming flight
results.change_action: should generate an ACK covering the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far
results.new_value: ACK covering received and processed messages from current incoming flight
results.comment: 收到当前 incoming flight 的部分记录后会启动 ack_timer，延迟发送 ACK，覆盖已接收并处理的记录。
results.standard_basis: it SHOULD generate an ACK that covers the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：should generate an ACK covering the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far；标准依据：it SHOULD generate an ACK that covers the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far.；代码行为：收到当前 incoming flight 的部分记录后会启动 ack_timer，延迟发送 ACK，覆盖已接收并处理的记录。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: when explicit ACKs are sent for a complete received flight that will eventually also be implicitly acknowledged
results.change_action: may acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one
results.new_value: each transmission of each flight or the most recent one
results.comment: ACK 处理按 record number 精确匹配 sent_records；runner 覆盖按正序、逆序、重复和旧记录 ACK 的情况。
results.standard_basis: Implementations MAY acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：may acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one；标准依据：Implementations MAY acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one.；代码行为：ACK 处理按 record number 精确匹配 sent_records；runner 覆盖按正序、逆序、重复和旧记录 ACK 的情况。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: when parsing DTLSHandshake
results.change_action: selected from offered list
results.new_value: select (msg_type) { case client_hello: ClientHello; case server_hello: ServerHello; case end_of_early_data: EndOfEarlyData; case encrypted_extensions: EncryptedExtensions; case certificate_request: CertificateRequest; case certificate: Certificate; case certificate_verify: CertificateVerify; case finished: Finished; case new_session_ticket: NewSessionTicket; case key_update: KeyUpdate; case request_connection_id: RequestConnectionId; case new_connection_id: NewConnectionId; }
results.comment: BoringSSL parses DTLS handshake fragments and dispatches complete handshake messages by message type.

results.change_condition: server's post-handshake CertificateRequest
results.change_action: implicitly acknowledged by receipt of the next flight
results.comment: 该条是 post-handshake CertificateRequest 的隐式 ACK 示例。BoringSSL 不主动发起 post-handshake authentication；对已支持的 post-handshake NewSessionTicket/KeyUpdate 使用显式 ACK 路径。
results.standard_basis: The server's post-handshake CertificateRequest.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：implicitly acknowledged by receipt of the next flight；标准依据：The server's post-handshake CertificateRequest.；代码行为：该条是 post-handshake CertificateRequest 的隐式 ACK 示例。BoringSSL 不主动发起 post-handshake authentication；对已支持的 post-handshake NewSessionTicket/KeyUpdate 使用显式 ACK 路径。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: If no CID is negotiated
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails
results.new_value: records containing a CID must be rejected
results.comment: 未协商 CID 时，parse_dtls13_record 在 C bit 置位时直接返回 false，记录被丢弃。
results.standard_basis: If no CID is negotiated, then the receiver MUST reject any records it receives that contain a CID.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：invalid if value check fails；标准依据：If no CID is negotiated, then the receiver MUST reject any records it receives that contain a CID.；代码行为：未协商 CID 时，parse_dtls13_record 在 C bit 置位时直接返回 false，记录被丢弃。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: If usage is set to "cid_immediate"
results.change_action: must be used immediately
results.new_value: one of the new CIDs used for all future records
results.comment: DTLS CID 是协商后的条件行为；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，因此 cid_immediate 使用规则不适用。
results.standard_basis: If usage is set to "cid_immediate", then one of the new CIDs MUST be used immediately for all future records.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be used immediately；标准依据：If usage is set to "cid_immediate", then one of the new CIDs MUST be used immediately for all future records.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。DTLS CID 是协商后的条件行为；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，因此 cid_immediate 使用规则不适用。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: More spare CIDs are received than desired to maintain
results.change_action: may discard extra CIDs
results.comment: DTLS CID spare CID 维护仅在实现 NewConnectionId/CID 协商时适用；BoringSSL 未实现该可选功能。
results.standard_basis: Implementations which receive more spare CIDs than they wish to maintain MAY simply discard any extra CIDs.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：may discard extra CIDs；标准依据：Implementations which receive more spare CIDs than they wish to maintain MAY simply discard any extra CIDs.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。DTLS CID spare CID 维护仅在实现 NewConnectionId/CID 协商时适用；BoringSSL 未实现该可选功能。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: Receiver-provided CIDs are used
results.change_action: selected in provided order
results.new_value: used in the order they were provided
results.comment: Receiver-provided CID 顺序使用仅在 CID 协商后适用；BoringSSL 不协商或保存 receiver-provided CIDs。
results.standard_basis: Endpoints SHOULD use receiver-provided CIDs in the order they were provided.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：selected in provided order；标准依据：Endpoints SHOULD use receiver-provided CIDs in the order they were provided.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。Receiver-provided CID 顺序使用仅在 CID 协商后适用；BoringSSL 不协商或保存 receiver-provided CIDs。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: if a Connection ID is negotiated
results.change_action: must be present
results.comment: 条件为 Connection ID 已协商；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，并在写路径固定 C=0。
results.standard_basis: If a Connection ID is negotiated, then it MUST be contained in all datagrams.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be present；标准依据：If a Connection ID is negotiated, then it MUST be contained in all datagrams.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。条件为 Connection ID 已协商；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，并在写路径固定 C=0。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: if the Connection ID is present
results.change_action: must be present
results.comment: BoringSSL 能解释 unified header 的 C bit，并在未协商 CID 的实现策略下拒绝该记录。
results.standard_basis: C:  The C bit (0x10) is set if the Connection ID is present.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be present；标准依据：C:  The C bit (0x10) is set if the Connection ID is present.；代码行为：BoringSSL 能解释 unified header 的 C bit，并在未协商 CID 的实现策略下拒绝该记录。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: if the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails
results.comment: 该条要求同一 datagram 多记录 CID 关联一致性；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，C bit 置位记录会被拒绝。
results.standard_basis: If the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records, the rest of the datagram MUST be discarded.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：invalid if value check fails；标准依据：If the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records, the rest of the datagram MUST be discarded.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条要求同一 datagram 多记录 CID 关联一致性；BoringSSL 不协商 CID，C bit 置位记录会被拒绝。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: for future cipher suites not based on AES or ChaCha20
results.change_action: must be present / must be absent
results.new_value: must define their own record sequence number encryption to be used with DTLS
results.comment: 该条约束未来非 AES/ChaCha20 cipher suite 的规范定义，不是 BoringSSL 当前运行时行为。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.1 and Section 11 IANA considerations
results.standard_basis: Future cipher suites, which are not based on AES or ChaCha20, MUST define their own record sequence number encryption in order to be used with DTLS.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be present / must be absent；标准依据：Future cipher suites, which are not based on AES or ChaCha20, MUST define their own record sequence number encryption in order to be used with DTLS.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条约束未来非 AES/ChaCha20 cipher suite 的规范定义，不是 BoringSSL 当前运行时行为。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello
results.change_action: must be selected from allowed set
results.comment: BoringSSL DTLS 1.3 uses the TLS 1.3 cipher suite set implemented by libssl, which is AES-GCM/AES-CCM/ChaCha20-Poly1305 based and has record-number encryption support.
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.1 and Section 11 IANA considerations
results.standard_basis: cipher_suites:  Same as for TLS 1.3; only suites with DTLS-OK=Y may be used.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be selected from allowed set；标准依据：cipher_suites:  Same as for TLS 1.3; only suites with DTLS-OK=Y may be used.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLS 1.3 只使用 DTLS-OK cipher suites，并且非 AES/ChaCha20 的未来套件要定义自己的记录序号加密。BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 记录层为已支持套件创建 RecordNumberEncrypter，并未引入不具备 DTLS 记录号保护定义的未来套件。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: any TLS cipher suite specified for use with DTLS
results.change_action: must define limits on use
results.new_value: define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity
results.comment: 该条是 TLS Cipher Suites 注册表/规范编写要求，不是实现中的单条运行时检查。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.1 and Section 11 IANA considerations
results.standard_basis: Any TLS cipher suite that is specified for use with DTLS MUST define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must define limits on use；标准依据：Any TLS cipher suite that is specified for use with DTLS MUST define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条是 TLS Cipher Suites 注册表/规范编写要求，不是实现中的单条运行时检查。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: when the client receives HelloRetryRequest containing a cookie
results.change_action: must send a new message with cookie added as an extension
results.new_value: new ClientHello with the cookie added as an extension
results.comment: 客户端解析 HelloRetryRequest 中的 cookie，复制到 hs->cookie，并在下一 ClientHello 的 cookie extension 中发送。
results.standard_basis: The client MUST send a new ClientHello with the cookie added as an extension.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must send a new message with cookie added as an extension；标准依据：The client MUST send a new ClientHello with the cookie added as an extension.；代码行为：客户端解析 HelloRetryRequest 中的 cookie，复制到 hs->cookie，并在下一 ClientHello 的 cookie extension 中发送。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: content types in the reserved range
results.change_action: validated range check
results.new_value: must not be allocated in range 32-63
results.comment: 该条是 IANA reserved content-type allocation 规则，不是实现必须分配的运行时行为。
results.standard_basis: IANA has reserved the content type range 32-63 so that content types in this range are not allocated.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：validated range check；标准依据：IANA has reserved the content type range 32-63 so that content types in this range are not allocated.；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。该条是 IANA reserved content-type allocation 规则，不是实现必须分配的运行时行为。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: DCT == 21
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Alert demultiplexing after decryption
results.comment: 解密后 inner content type 为 alert 时调用 ssl_process_alert。
results.standard_basis: DCT == 21 -+--> Alert
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal mapped constant for Alert demultiplexing after decryption；标准依据：DCT == 21 -+--> Alert；代码行为：解密后 inner content type 为 alert 时调用 ssl_process_alert。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 22
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for DTLSHandshake demultiplexing after decryption
results.comment: 解密后 inner content type 为 handshake 时由 d1_pkt/d1_both 交给 DTLS handshake fragment 处理。
results.standard_basis: DCT == 22 -+--> DTLSHandshake
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal mapped constant for DTLSHandshake demultiplexing after decryption；标准依据：DCT == 22 -+--> DTLSHandshake；代码行为：解密后 inner content type 为 handshake 时由 d1_pkt/d1_both 交给 DTLS handshake fragment 处理。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 23
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Application Data demultiplexing after decryption
results.comment: 解密后 inner content type 为 application_data 时检查 epoch 允许性后返回应用数据。
results.standard_basis: DCT == 23 -+--> Application Data
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal mapped constant for Application Data demultiplexing after decryption；标准依据：DCT == 23 -+--> Application Data；代码行为：解密后 inner content type 为 application_data 时检查 epoch 允许性后返回应用数据。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 24
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Heartbeat demultiplexing after decryption
results.comment: Heartbeat content type 取决于 Heartbeat 扩展支持；BoringSSL 当前未实现 DTLS Heartbeat 路径，因此该映射不适用。
results.standard_basis: DCT == 24 -+--> Heartbeat
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal mapped constant for Heartbeat demultiplexing after decryption；标准依据：DCT == 24 -+--> Heartbeat；代码行为：该 JSON 条目的条件在 BoringSSL 当前功能集中不成立。Heartbeat content type 取决于 Heartbeat 扩展支持；BoringSSL 当前未实现 DTLS Heartbeat 路径，因此该映射不适用。；结论：不适用。

results.change_condition: DCT == 26
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for ACK demultiplexing after decryption
results.comment: 解密后 inner content type 为 ACK 时 d1_pkt 调用 dtls1_process_ack。
results.standard_basis: DCT == 26 -+--> ACK
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must equal mapped constant for ACK demultiplexing after decryption；标准依据：DCT == 26 -+--> ACK；代码行为：解密后 inner content type 为 ACK 时 d1_pkt 调用 dtls1_process_ack。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: else
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails; error
results.comment: 非 alert/application_data/handshake/ACK 等路径在 open_handshake/open_app_data 中以 unexpected record 拒绝。
results.standard_basis: else ------+--> Error
results.comparison_summary: 需求：invalid if value check fails; error；标准依据：else ------+--> Error；代码行为：非 alert/application_data/handshake/ACK 等路径在 open_handshake/open_app_data 中以 unexpected record 拒绝。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: if the client does not offer early data
results.change_action: must be absent / skipped
results.comment: early_data epoch 仅在对应加密级别被安装时出现；没有 early data offer 时不会安装 epoch 1。
results.standard_basis: Note that this epoch is skipped if the client does not offer early data.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：must be absent / skipped；标准依据：Note that this epoch is skipped if the client does not offer early data.；代码行为：early_data epoch 仅在对应加密级别被安装时出现；没有 early data offer 时不会安装 epoch 1。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: received prior to receiving a ServerHello
results.change_action: cannot safely be acknowledged because it cannot be decrypted
results.comment: EncryptedExtensions 未能解密时记录层在 AEAD Open 失败处丢弃，且不会加入 records_to_ack。
results.standard_basis: a client might receive an EncryptedExtensions message prior to receiving a ServerHello. Because it cannot decrypt the EncryptedExtensions, it cannot safely acknowledge it
results.comparison_summary: 需求：cannot safely be acknowledged because it cannot be decrypted；标准依据：a client might receive an EncryptedExtensions message prior to receiving a ServerHello. Because it cannot decrypt the EncryptedExtensions, it cannot safely acknowledge it；代码行为：EncryptedExtensions 未能解密时记录层在 AEAD Open 失败处丢弃，且不会加入 records_to_ack。；结论：满足。

results.change_condition: In DTLSCiphertext
results.change_action: derived/computed from another field
results.new_value: encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure
results.comment: BoringSSL implements DTLS 1.3 unified record header parsing, record-number reconstruction/encryption, AEAD deprotection, inner content-type tail scan, and invalid-type rejection.
results.standard_basis: encrypted_record: The encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure.
results.comparison_summary: 需求：derived/computed from another field；标准依据：encrypted_record: The encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure.；代码行为：标准要求 DTLSCiphertext 的 encrypted_record 是加密后的 DTLSInnerPlaintext，解密后按内部 content type 分派并拒绝未知类型。代码先解析 DTLS 1.3 header、重建 epoch/sequence、用 AEAD 打开密文，再从明文尾部移除零填充并读取内部 content type；alert、application_data、handshake、ACK 有相应路径，其他类型在上层读取路径中报 unexpected record。；结论：满足。
